steps.title: Close the paired dash
steps.content: The sentence opens an em-dash interruption after postmodern dance, then includes a parenthetical list. At the blank, the sentence must close the parenthesis and also close the em-dash interruption before continuing with to video.

steps.title: Match both marks
steps.content: Choice A closes the parenthesis but uses a comma instead of the needed dash. Choice B uses a semicolon, which does not close the dash pair. Choice D leaves the em-dash interruption unclosed. The remaining choice supplies the parenthesis and closing dash. The answer is C.
